name: angel-arena
description: Angel Arena — 2D Top-Down PVE Survival Game with 21 Unique Bosses
author: Angel Studio

scripts.build-win: electron-packager . "Angel Arena" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist/ --overwrite --icon=public/favicon.png --ignore="dist|\.git|node_modules/electron(-.*)?|release\.tar\.gz|scratch/|logs/|chat-history/|qa_.*\.js|search_.*\.js|update_pve\.js|ssh_command\.js|fast-deploy\.js|deploy\.js|build_manually\.js" --app-version=1.0.0 --win32metadata.ProductName="Angel Arena" --win32metadata.CompanyName="Angel Studio" --win32metadata.FileDescription="Angel Arena PVE Game"
